title: NutritionLabelAnalysis
description: NutriCheck / Nutrition Label payload for the extension (v1). Share this file with Irfan for UI binding.

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the analysis. Lower when grounding is weak or absent.

summary.description: Short neutral summary of credibility / alignment / visual cues. No URLs in this field.

factualAlignment.description: Alignment with verifiable claims / search-backed facts (0–100).

visualIntegrity.description: Image/manipulation/context signals. Use 0 (or a neutral mid value agreed with UI) when no image was analyzed.

sources.description: Normalized web sources from Gemini groundingMetadata only. Rules: (1) Each item must map from groundingChunks[].web (uri/title). (2) Do not add URLs parsed from model text. (3) Dedupe by uri. (4) If grounding is missing or empty, return [].

uri.description: Canonical URI from grounding chunk (may be redirect/wrapper URLs per API).

title.description: Source title from grounding chunk when present.

flags.description: Machine-readable tags e.g. weak_grounding, multimodal, disputed_claim.

groundingDebug.description: Optional server-only or dev-only echo of webSearchQueries; omit in production extension responses if desired.
